requirementCueLines: 1. one of AMATH 481 or CSE 163 (4-5 credits)
1) Methods of Applied Mathematics: Minimum two courses from AMATH 401, AMATH 402, AMATH 403
2. one of AMATH 482, CSE 414, or INFO 430 (4-5 credits)
2) Modeling: Minimum two courses from AMATH 342, AMATH 383, AMATH 422, AMATH 423
3. AMATH 483, CFRM 410, and CFRM 420 (11 credits)
3) Computing and Data Sciences: Minimum two courses from AMATH 481, AMATH 482, AMATH 483, CFRM 410, CFRM 420, CFRM 421
4. one of CFRM 421, CSE 416/STAT 416, or STAT 435 (4 credits)
4) Additional courses from the above lists to bring the elective minimum total to 27 credits.
5. INFO 351 (4 credits) or SOC 225 (3 or 5 credits)
B.S. in Applied Mathematics: Data Science Option
B.S. in Computational Finance & Risk Management: Data Science Option
B.S. to M.S. Pathway
Computing: AMATH 301 (4 credits)
Data Science (23-25 credits):
Degree Requirements:
Electives (minimum 27 credits)
General Education requirements for College of Arts and Sciences students may be found here .
Introductory Applied Mathematics: AMATH 351, AMATH 352, AMATH 353 (9 credits)
Mathematics: MATH 124, MATH 125, MATH 126 (or MATH 134, MATH 135, MATH 136) (15 credits)
Minimum 54-59 credits:
Requirements for Data Science Option: (26-30 credits)
Society and Data (3-5 credits):
pathwayLabels: How do you major in AMATH with a Data Science option?
What is Applied Mathematics with a Data Science option?
